case_title: STOCKBRIDGE CAPITAL GROUP LLC VS. KATE YIU ET AL

docket_entries.description: EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR POSTING AND MAILING OF SUMMONS / APPLICATION FOR ORDER PERMITTING SERVICE BY POSTING AND MAILING, DECLARATION OF PROCESS SERVCER, AND POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOCKBRIDGE CAPITAL GROUP LLC

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF STOCKBRIDGE CAPITAL GROUP LLC RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT YIU, KATE THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 1285 SUTTER STREET, UNIT #604, CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94109, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT

DECLARATION RE: LOST ORIGINAL RENTAL AGREEMENT, THREE DAY NOTICE AND PROOF OF SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF STOCKBRIDGE CAPITAL GROUP LLC

REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT YIU, KATE
